title: How might Shinji learn to Love himself
display_title: How might Shinji learn to Love himself
wikitext:
[]: How might Shinji learn to Love himself?             Quote Post by scwizard » Mon Jul 10, 2006 12:51 am Well?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Jul 10, 2006 12:54 am By finding his way out of his dipresion

[]: Re: A question             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 10, 2006 1:06 am scwizard wrote: How might Shinji learn to love himself?

[]: Re: A question             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Mon Jul 10, 2006 1:26 am Reichu wrote: scwizard wrote: How might Shinji learn to love himself?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 10, 2006 2:19 am He needs to find a way out of his dispersion. You need to be in one piece before you can love yourself.

[]: Re: A question             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jul 10, 2006 8:31 am scwizard wrote: How might Shinji learn to love himself?

[]: Re: A question             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Mon Jul 10, 2006 8:40 am The Eva Monkey wrote: scwizard wrote: How might Shinji learn to love himself?

[]:             Quote Post by Light of the Dawn » Thu Jul 13, 2006 4:51 pm As far as I remember it happened all of a sudden, and it felt rather improvised. He was all like "Hey, I don't have to hate myself! I can love myself instead!" or something. Stupid TV series ending. :/

[]:             Quote Post by captainhaddock » Thu Jul 13, 2006 7:04 pm I thought it was when he realized he could change his own perspective on life, he could be happy. And the rain thing meant you don't have to accept everything you know....a rainy day doesn't have to be sad just because that's your current view on it.

[]: Re: A question             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Fri Jul 14, 2006 1:05 am Legend of the Past wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: scwizard wrote: How might Shinji learn to love himself?

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Fri Jul 14, 2006 2:17 am Yes, but the fact is Episode 26's lessons are aimed at the VIEWERS. Shinji may be a dummy but he isn't a complete moron. Shinji needed encouragment, fine, encourage him in a way that doesn't sound like a mom telling her son not to be sad because things are bad! ... My God. My dear God.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Fri Jul 14, 2006 2:22 am I kinda felt like it was directed to both Shinji and us but you have a point it is kinda... parentish talking... but of course we are all children (even tines) Our minds are never going to be to the point of complete knowing, I mean the only way to know everything is... A) Create 3I or B) become buddah!

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Fri Jul 14, 2006 2:59 am Tines? A kid? Pffft.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 14, 2006 3:44 am Indeed. Mr. Tines is a dirty old man. But I guess he'd have to be a big kid to geek out as much as he does. "You're only as old as you feel." If the cliche is to be believed. I wouldn't call myself a children*, and I'm by definition not a teenager. But I don't feel like an adult even though that's what I supposedly am. I guess that makes me a... a... hmm. * lol

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Fri Jul 14, 2006 3:50 am You're still not out of adolesence 'till 24, 25. At least, that's what the nurse told us in sixth grade.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jul 14, 2006 1:42 pm Reichu wrote: Indeed. Mr. Tines is a dirty old man. But I guess he'd have to be a big kid to geek out as much as he does.

[]:             Quote Post by scwizard » Fri Jul 14, 2006 6:33 pm Reichu wrote: I wouldn't call myself a children* * lol

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 14, 2006 11:52 pm scwizard wrote: Proof that you spend way too much of your life struggling with translating Eva. :P

[]:             Quote Post by vatt » Mon Sep 11, 2006 7:12 am Reichu wrote: He needs to find a way out of his dispersion. You need to be in one piece before you can love yourself.

[]: Re: A question             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Sep 11, 2006 3:20 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: scwizard wrote: How might Shinji learn to love himself?
